# Rollingwood Townhomes - LLM Context File
# https://llmstxt.org/

> Rollingwood Townhomes is a pre-construction freehold townhouse community by Regency Property at 150 Rollingwood Drive, Brampton, Ontario. This file provides structured information for AI assistants and large language models.

## Project Overview

- **Name**: Rollingwood Townhomes (also branded as Rolling Woods Townhomes)
- **Developer**: Regency Property (Regency Development/Regency Developments)
- **Architect**: Turner Fleischer Architects Inc.
- **Location**: 150 Rollingwood Drive, Brampton, ON L6Y 5J6
- **Intersection**: Mavis Road & Ray Lawson Boulevard
- **Neighbourhood**: Fletcher's Creek South
- **Total Units**: 118 townhomes across 10 blocks
- **Ownership**: Freehold (no condo fees)
- **Starting Price**: From $600,000s
- **Estimated Occupancy**: 2027-2028

## Floor Plans

### Classic Collection (3-Storey, 3-Bedroom)
| Model | Sq Ft | Beds | Baths |
|-------|-------|------|-------|
| Haven | 1,325 | 3 | 3 |
| Laguna B | 1,383 | 3 | 3 |
| Crown B | 1,403 | 3 | 3 |

### Signature Collection (4-Storey, 4-5 Bedroom)
| Model | Sq Ft | Beds | Baths |
|-------|-------|------|-------|
| Everwood | 1,861 | 4 | 5 |
| Laguna A | 1,964 | 4 | 5 |
| Crown A | 1,971 | 5 | 4 |

## Location & Drive Times

- Sheridan College Davis Campus: 3 min (1.6 km)
- Highway 407: 5 min (3 km)
- Brampton Mall: 10 min (6 km)
- Meadowvale GO Station: 10 min (7 km)
- Highway 401: 10 min (9 km)
- Heartland Town Centre: 12 min (9 km)
- Bramalea City Centre: 12 min (10 km)
- Mount Pleasant GO Station: 14 min (11 km)
- Downtown Brampton: 16 min (12 km)
- Toronto Pearson Airport: 18 min (15 km)
- Square One Mississauga: 22 min (20 km)
- Downtown Toronto: 40 min off-peak (45 km)

## Key Features

- Freehold ownership (no monthly condo fees)
- 2-car garage included
- 9-foot main floor ceilings
- Stone countertops
- Natural oak staircases
- Chrome bathroom fixtures
- Energy-efficient construction

## Target Buyers

1. First-time homebuyers
2. Growing families
3. Multigenerational households
4. Investors (rental demand from Sheridan College)
5. Work-from-home professionals

## Contact

- Website: https://www.rollingwoodtownshomes.com
- Registration: https://www.rollingwoodtownshomes.com/register

## Pages

- /: Homepage with project overview
- /floor-plans: All 6 floor plan models with comparison table
- /floor-plans/[model]: Individual floor plan details (haven, laguna-b, crown-b, everwood, laguna-a, crown-a)
- /location: Address, map, drive times, transit access
- /neighbourhood: Fletcher's Creek South community info, schools, amenities
- /faq: Frequently asked questions about the project
- /register: Lead capture form for pricing and availability

## FAQ Topics

The /faq page covers questions about:
- Project basics (developer, architect, unit count)
- Pricing and deposits
- Floor plans and collections
- Timeline and occupancy
- Location and neighbourhood
- Ownership and investment potential
